summary.zh: 代码工作台(规划中)。目标是把现有的 MainArea 代码视图升级成独立插件:在 Studio 内浏览、跳转一款游戏的 src/ 文件,并与 cc-coder 跨对话线程协作改代码,让「看代码」和「让 AI 改代码」在同一个面板里衔接。当前为 marketplace 占位:清单与入口就位,真实面板实现安排在后续 sprint。
summary.en: Code workbench (planned). The goal is to upgrade the existing MainArea code view into a standalone plugin: browse and jump through a game's src/ files inside Studio and collaborate with cc-coder across chat threads, so 'reading code' and 'having AI change code' meet in one panel. Currently a marketplace placeholder: manifest and entry are in place, with the real panel scheduled for a later sprint.

body.zh:
浏览 + 跳转 src/ 文件
与 cc-coder 跨线程协作改代码
body.en:
Browse + jump src/ files
Collaborate with cc-coder across threads

body.zh: marketplace 占位,面板实现待后续 sprint
body.en: Marketplace placeholder; panel lands in a later sprint
